issues.description: Action type is SearchDeck (which draws/adds to hand), but card text says 'Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of the deck in any order' — this is a deck manipulation/reordering effect, not a search. SearchDeck is incorrect; no standard action properly captures 'look and reorder' without drawing.
Missing second effect: [Blocker] keyword and its associated mechanic (opponent declares attack → may rest this card to make it new target) is completely absent from DSL.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
[On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of the deck in any order.

effects.description: Blocker effect: rest this card to redirect attack

actions.note: Look at top 3 and reorder to top or bottom
